name: Shaver Shop Group Limited
analysis: SSG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.3400, stop A$1.1930, target A$1.4850 (0.99:1) — then trail it.
